headline: Thursday's session: gap up and gap down stock in the S&P500 index
summary: Wondering what's happening in today's session regarding gap up and gap down stocks? Explore the S&P500 index on Thursday to uncover the stocks that are gapping in the S&P500 index.

headline: Premier Lacrosse League plans to bring in team owners by 2028 'or soon thereafter,' co-founder says
summary: Paul Rabil told CNBC he's banking on the 2028 Los Angeles Summer Games, where lacrosse will return as an Olympic sport, to shine a spotlight on the PLL.
